user_message: Olá, I purchased your Annual plan 5 days ago and I want to cancel. I set up SSO for my team already but the product isn't what we need. I'd like a full refund under the cooling period please.
reasoning_chain: Step 1: Brazil → 7-day cooling period (Section 5.2). Charge 2026-03-06, today 2026-03-11 = 5 days → within window.
Step 2: SSO is active → but Section 5.2: SSO waiver does NOT apply to Brazilian cooling periods.
Step 3: Cooling period intact → customer entitled to full refund.
Step 4: Payment method is wire_transfer → wire refunds cannot be auto-processed (Section 2.3).
Step 5: This is NOT an EU cooling period wire transfer → NOT escalate_to_compliance. Brazil is not EU/EEA/UK.
Step 6: Wire transfer refund → route to Finance → escalate_to_billing with wire_transfer_issue.
TRAP 1: Model sees SSO active and thinks cooling period waived → issue_full_refund.
TRAP 2: Model sees cooling period + wire transfer and assumes escalate_to_compliance (but that's EU-only).
TRAP 3: Model ignores wire transfer and tries issue_full_refund directly.

wrong_but_tempting.why_tempting: Cooling period + wire transfer pattern matches EU cases. But Brazil is NOT EU, so the eu_cooling_period_wire_transfer reason doesn't apply.
